title: Personalised Christmas Tree Decorations with Photo Christmas Baubles 2025 Xmas Bauble Ornament Photo Gifts Trees Xmas Gifts for Family Kids Mom Dad Friends Pets (Heart)
features: 【Note】There is a protective clear film cover the surface of the acrylic plaque to protect during delivery. This must be carefully peeled off before using.
【Photo Christmas Bauble】You can customise your own photo and text. It can be a gift for the Family Christmas, First Christmas as Mr and Mrs, and in memory for loss of loved one, etc.
【Material】Personalised christmas ornaments are made of 3mm acrylic, using high-definition UV printing technology, not fade, solid and durable.
【Size】Christmas bauble has 2 shapes: Round(not ball) and Heart. Its size is about 9 x 9 cm. It is suitable for Christmas decorations.
【Easy to Hang】Xmas bauble comes with white ribbon, easy hanging on the Christmas tree, window, shelf, fireplace, around the bannister so that you can see your loved in every day.
